## 📋 Description

Brief description of the changes in this PR.

## 🔄 Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] 🎨 Code style/formatting
- [ ] ♻️ Refactoring
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] 🔧 Build/CI configuration

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project (run `cargo fmt`)
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings (run `cargo clippy`)
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes (run `cargo test`)
- [ ] Code coverage remains ≥85% (run `cargo tarpaulin`)
- [ ] The PR title follows conventional commits format (e.g., "feat: add image zoom feature")

## 🧪 Testing

Describe the tests you ran and how to reproduce them:

```bash
# Example test commands
cargo test
cargo test --test integration_test
cargo tarpaulin --fail-under 85
```

## 📸 Screenshots (if applicable)

Add screenshots to help explain your changes (for UI changes).

## 🔗 Related Issues

Fixes #(issue number)
Related to #(issue number)
